summary: REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear implemented via a new landing image preloading hook, wiring it into the landing page, and adding automatic + manual retry behavior to MediaFrame. REQ-3 (static asset optimization/recompression with unchanged URLs) is not evidenced in the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Optimize the static image assets used by the landing page to reduce total bytes while keeping all existing image URLs unchanged.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows only TypeScript/TSX and HTML changes (preloading logic and retry logic). There is no evidence of any image files in the static assets folder being recompressed/modified, nor any before/after size comparison.
evidence: File diff summary shows only: frontend/src/hooks/useLandingImagePreload.ts (added), frontend/src/components/landing/MediaFrame.tsx (modified), frontend/src/pages/TbnLandingPage.tsx (modified), frontend/index.html (modified), plus summaries/project_state.json. No /assets image files are listed as modified.
